---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or change
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

<!-- Describe the user pain. Skip "wouldn't it be cool if" — start with
     what's hard or impossible right now. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Your idea for the feature. Sketches, mockups, API shape — whatever
     helps. It's fine to leave this open if you only know the problem. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you find a workaround? Other tools that do this? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Backend only
- [ ] Frontend only
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Documentation only

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: regulatory requirements, similar feature in QuickBooks,
     links to relevant specs. -->
